summary: Observe confirms that registration is blocked by a real Open5GS rejection on the declared lane.
suggested_next: capture artifacts for the registration rejection
compare subscriber and NGAP identity against the declared core profile
retry only after the core-side mismatch is explained

checks.name: NG Setup
checks.detail: NG setup completed against the declared Open5GS endpoint before the rejection

checks.name: Initial UE Message
checks.detail: initial UE access reached the NGAP-facing lane for the declared profile

checks.name: Uplink NAS Transport
checks.detail: uplink NAS transport carried the registration request to the declared AMF endpoint

checks.name: Downlink NAS Transport
checks.detail: downlink NAS transport carried the Open5GS rejection toward the UE lane

checks.name: UE Context Release
checks.detail: cleanup evidence shows the UE context was released after the rejection

c_plane.reason: registration did not progress to acceptance on the NGAP-facing edge

u_plane.reason: user-plane was not reached after the control-plane rejection

ngap.reason: the last observed NGAP procedure ended in registration rejection

gtpu.reason: session establishment and ping were not reached

core_link_status.reason: the real Open5GS core rejected the declared subscriber or identity context

procedures.name: NG Setup
procedures.detail: the declared AMF accepted NG setup before registration began

procedures.name: Initial UE Message
procedures.detail: the first UE-originated NAS message reached the NGAP-facing edge

procedures.name: Uplink NAS Transport
procedures.detail: uplink NAS transport carried the registration request to the real core

procedures.name: Downlink NAS Transport
procedures.detail: downlink NAS transport returned a registration rejection from the declared core profile

procedures.name: UE Context Release
procedures.detail: UE context release completed and the cleanup state is auditable

attach_status.reason: attach did not progress beyond the NGAP registration stage

pdu_session_status.reason: session setup not reached after the NGAP rejection

ping_status.reason: ping not attempted after the attach failure
